metaDescription: Join our team and help build the future of HR software for Bulgarian businesses.

hero.heading: Join Our Team
hero.subheading: Help us build the HR platform that makes a real difference for companies and candidates.

culture.heading: Why Work With Us
culture.subheading: We're building something special - and we'd love for you to be part of it.

remote.title: Remote-First
remote.description: Work from anywhere in Bulgaria. We trust our team to deliver great work, wherever they are.

learning.title: Continuous Learning
learning.description: Access to courses, conferences, and a budget for your professional development.

health.title: Health & Wellness
health.description: Private health insurance, gym allowances, and mental health support.

retreats.title: Team Retreats
retreats.description: Regular team building events and annual retreats to connect and recharge.

positions.heading: Open Positions
positions.subheading: We're always looking for talented people to join our team.
positions.noMatch: No positions match your criteria at the moment, but we're always interested in hearing from great people.

benefits.heading: Benefits & Perks
benefits.subheading: We take care of our team so they can take care of our customers.

process.heading: Our Hiring Process
process.subheading: Transparent, respectful, and designed to find the best fit for both sides.

steps.title: Application Review
steps.description: We review every application carefully and respond within 5 business days.

steps.title: Technical Interview
steps.description: A technical discussion with the team to assess skills and cultural fit.

steps.title: Final Interview
steps.description: Meet the leadership team and discuss your vision for the role.

steps.title: Offer
steps.description: We'll extend an offer with detailed compensation and benefits information.

cta.heading: Ready to Join Us?
cta.subheading: Take the next step in your career and help shape the future of HR in Bulgaria.
